title: [ESI] Lower ExternModule ESI ports to SystemVerilog interfaces
body:
Adds a pass which converts ESI ChannelPorts on `rtl.externmodule`s to interfaces:
- Constructs a typed `sv.interface` for each channel type.
- Converts input ports on `rtl.externmodules` to `@source` modports.
- Moves output ports to arguments and converts to `@sink` modports.
- Adds gaskets to `rtl.instances` of said modules.

The modport naming of source/sink can be confusing. Think from the module's interior perspective: The input to the module is the 'source' of the data. You output to a 'sink'. (I need to draw up some diagrams for my own sanity.)
